dispatch_prompt_template.old: Inline (per-batch, typed by orchestrator). Templates extracted post-hoc to skills/spyglass/evals/dispatch_prompts.md.
dispatch_prompt_template.new: skills/spyglass/evals/dispatch_prompts.md (with_skill / without_skill templates, no-bundle-peek + no-grading-peek prohibitions enforced)

note: causal_changed=true means at least one dimension that can plausibly shift headline / transition deltas differs between runs (skill commit, spyglass src commit, model, harness, dispatch prompt template, grader model / version / prompt / prompt_sha256, or canonical evals catalog hash); treat headline shifts skeptically. metadata_changed=true reflects differences that do NOT undermine attribution: label-only fields (round_label, skill_branch) and the raw evals_snapshot bytes hash, which can flip on snapshot reformatting / source-path changes without any actual eval drift.
